# Thermogravimetric

**Summary**: A method to measure changes in mass of a sample as it is heated.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-lawal|LAWAL, 2021]] applied TGA to study the thermal decomposition and gas evolution of carbonate source rocks.

## Key Results and Findings

- The thermogravimetric decay curve showed significant deviations from the prescribed heating program after 200°C, suggesting mineral catalysis. ([[2021-lawal|LAWAL, 2021, p. 43]])
